build_system: dotnet CLI + AWS CDK CLI (npx cdk). Solution file at src/CdkBase.sln
verification_instructions: 1. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln 2. dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln 3. dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal 4. npx cdk synth
setup_instructions: Install .NET 8 SDK via dotnet-install.sh script. Install Node.js (already available via nvm). Install CDK CLI via npm install -g aws-cdk.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can access package registries. .NET SDK is NOT pre-installed - must install via dotnet-install.sh. Node.js 22 is available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first approach: write failing tests first using CDK Assertions, then implement minimal code. All changes must trace to ARCHITECTURE.md. Conventional commits required.
key_patterns: Stack defined in src/CdkBase/CdkBaseStack.cs. Tests in src/CdkBase.Tests/CdkBaseStackTest.cs using xUnit [Fact] and Template.FromStack(). InternalsVisibleTo allows test project to access internal stack constructors. GlobalSuppressions.cs suppresses RECS0026 for CDK construct patterns.
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, README.md. src/CdkBase/ contains CDK app (Program.cs, CdkBaseStack.cs). src/CdkBase.Tests/ contains xUnit tests. docs/ contains ARCHITECTURE.md and AGENT_GUIDELINES.md. .github/workflows/ci.yml defines CI pipeline.
